properties.body:
[Southern Baltic] POLISH NAV WARN 063/26
SOUTHERN BALTIC. POLISH COAST.
DUE TO MILITARY EXERCISES ZONE IS CLOSED FOR SHIPPING AND FISHERY:
S-6 CENTERED 54-39.27N 016-36.59E
FROM 2026-03-30 TO 2026-04-01 05:00 - 12:00 AND 17:00 - 23:59 UTC.
FROM 2026-04-02 TO 2026-04-04 05:00 - 12:00 UTC
CANCEL 041200 UTC APR
